languages.text: "Впервые слышу об этом восстании, Янрис. Это ошибка или ты что-то скрыл от меня?"

traits.locale_text: "Впервые слышу об этом восстании, Янрис. Это ошибка или ты что-то скрыл от меня?"

languages.text: "This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you been concealing something from me?"
languages.original_text: "Впервые слышу об этом восстании, Янрис. Это ошибка или ты что-то скрыл от меня?"

traits.locale_text: "This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you concealed something from me?"
"This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you been concealing something from me?"
"This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you been concealing something from me?"
"This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you been concealing something from me?"

languages.text: «Es la primera noticia que tengo de esta insurrección, Janris. ¿Se trata de un error, o acaso me ha estado ocultando cosas?».
languages.original_text: "This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you been concealing something from me?"

traits.locale_text: «Es la primera noticia que tengo de esta insurrección, Janris. ¿Se trata de un error, o acaso me ha estado ocultando cosas?».

languages.text: “这场叛乱我还是头一回听说，詹里斯。是哪里弄错了，还是你一直对我有所隐瞒？”
languages.original_text: "This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you been concealing something from me?"

traits.locale_text: “这场叛乱我还是头一回听说，詹里斯。是哪里弄错了，还是你一直对我有所隐瞒？”

languages.text: « C'est la première fois que j'entends parler de cette révolte, Janris. Est-ce une erreur de votre part, ou me l'avez-vous cachée à dessein ? »
languages.original_text: "This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you been concealing something from me?"

traits.locale_text: « C'est la première fois que j'entends parler de cette révolte, Janris. Est-ce une erreur de votre part, ou me l'avez-vous cachée à dessein ? »

languages.text: "Bu isyanı ilk kez duyuyorum Janris. Bir hata mı oldu yoksa benden bir şey mi saklıyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you been concealing something from me?"

traits.locale_text: "Bu isyanı ilk kez duyuyorum Janris. Bir hata mı oldu yoksa benden bir şey mi saklıyorsun?"

languages.text: 「この蜂起について、私は初めて耳にする。ジャンリス、これは誤りか、それとも君が何かを隠していたのか？」
languages.original_text: "This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you been concealing something from me?"

traits.locale_text: 「この蜂起について、私は初めて耳にする。ジャンリス、これは誤りか、それとも君が何かを隠していたのか？」

languages.text: "Das ist das erste Mal, dass ich von diesem Aufstand höre, Janris. Ist das ein Fehler oder habt Ihr mir etwas verheimlicht?"
languages.original_text: "This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you been concealing something from me?"

traits.locale_text: "Das ist das erste Mal, dass ich von diesem Aufstand höre, Janris. Ist das ein Fehler oder habt Ihr mir etwas verheimlicht?"
